title: ammi majus subsp. procerum
intro: Ammi majus subsp. procerum, also known as lesser ammi or small ammi, is a perennial herb belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its ability to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ammi majus subsp. procerum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various ailments, including colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
